description: FP Full Spectrum — classification event.dataset par tags/os_type/message/index hints

script.source: if (ctx.event == null) { ctx.event = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.log == null) { ctx.log = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.host == null) { ctx.host = new HashMap(); } String ds = ctx.event.containsKey('dataset') ? ctx.event.dataset : null; String msg = ctx.message != null ? ctx.message : ''; String os = ctx.os_type != null ? ctx.os_type : ''; if (ds == null || ds.length() == 0) { if (ctx.csv_EventID != null || os == 'windows' || (ctx.tags != null && ctx.tags.contains('windows'))) { if (msg.contains('Sysmon') || msg.contains('Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.sysmon'; } else if (msg.contains('PowerShell') || msg.contains('4103') || msg.contains('4104')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.powershell'; } else if (msg.contains('WinRM') || msg.contains('Microsoft-Windows-WinRM')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.winrm'; } else if (msg.contains('TerminalServices') || msg.contains('RDP') || msg.contains('4624')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.rdp'; } else if (msg.contains('WMI') || msg.contains('Microsoft-Windows-WMI')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.wmi'; } else if (msg.contains('AppLocker')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.applocker'; } else { ctx.event.dataset = 'windows.security'; } } else if (ctx.tags != null) { for (def t : ctx.tags) { if (t == 'linux') { String p = (ctx.log != null && ctx.log.file != null && ctx.log.file.path != null) ? ctx.log.file.path : ''; if (p.contains('auth') || msg.contains('sshd') || msg.contains('sudo')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'system.auth'; } else if (msg.contains('kernel') || p.contains('kern')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'system.kernel'; } else if (msg.contains('CRON') || msg.contains('cron')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'system.cron'; } else { ctx.event.dataset = 'system.syslog'; } break; } if (t == 'nginx' || t == 'apache' || t == 'web') { ctx.event.dataset = msg.contains('ingress') ? 'web.ingress' : 'web.nginx'; break; } if (t == 'firewall' || t == 'network') { ctx.event.dataset = 'network.firewall'; break; } if (t == 'kape' || t == 'dfir') { ctx.event.dataset = 'dfir.kape'; break; } if (t == 'plaso') { ctx.event.dataset = 'dfir.plaso'; break; } if (t == 'cloud' || t == 'aws') { ctx.event.dataset = 'cloud.aws'; break; } if (t == 'azure') { ctx.event.dataset = 'cloud.azure'; break; } if (t == 'gcp') { ctx.event.dataset = 'cloud.gcp'; break; } if (t == 'edr' || t == 'sentinelone' || t == 'crowdstrike' || t == 'defender') { ctx.event.dataset = 'edr.generic'; break; } } } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && msg.contains('AWS CloudTrail')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'cloud.aws'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && (msg.contains('Azure') || msg.contains('Microsoft.Authorization'))) { ctx.event.dataset = 'cloud.azure'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && msg.contains('MFTECmd')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'dfir.mft'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && (msg.contains('Plaso') || msg.contains('timesketch'))) { ctx.event.dataset = 'dfir.plaso'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && ctx.metric_type != null) { ctx.event.dataset = 'timeline.timesketch'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && ctx.service != null) { ctx.event.dataset = 'fp.platform'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && ctx.feed != null) { ctx.event.dataset = 'ti.' + ctx.feed; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && ctx.ioc_value != null) { ctx.event.dataset = 'ti.ioc'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && msg.contains('FP-DET')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'security.detection'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && msg.contains('FP-SIGMA')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'security.sigma'; } if ((ctx.event.dataset == null || ctx.event.dataset.length() == 0) && msg.contains('FP-TI-Match')) { ctx.event.dataset = 'security.ti_match'; } } def ec = ctx.event.category; boolean needCat = ec == null; if (!needCat && ec instanceof String) { needCat = ((String) ec).length() == 0; } if (!needCat && ec instanceof List) { needCat = ((List) ec).isEmpty(); } if (needCat) { String d = ctx.event.dataset; if (d != null) { if (d.startsWith('web.')) { ctx.event.category = 'web'; } else if (d.startsWith('network.')) { ctx.event.category = 'network'; } else if (d.startsWith('windows.') || d.startsWith('system.')) { ctx.event.category = 'host'; } else if (d.startsWith('cloud.')) { ctx.event.category = 'cloud'; } else if (d.startsWith('dfir.')) { ctx.event.category = 'dfir'; } else if (d.startsWith('edr.')) { ctx.event.category = 'intrusion_detection'; } else if (d.startsWith('timeline.')) { ctx.event.category = 'dfir'; } else if (d.startsWith('security.')) { ctx.event.category = 'intrusion_detection'; } else if (d.startsWith('ti.')) { ctx.event.category = 'threat'; } else if (d.startsWith('fp.')) { ctx.event.category = 'process'; } } } if (ctx.event.type == null || ctx.event.type.length() == 0) { ctx.event.type = ctx.ioc_value != null ? 'indicator' : 'info'; } if (ctx.log.level == null && ctx.level != null) { ctx.log.level = ctx.level; } if (ctx.log.source == null && ctx.log.file != null && ctx.log.file.path != null) { ctx.log.source = ctx.log.file.path; } if (ctx.host.name == null) { if (ctx.agent != null && ctx.agent.name != null) { ctx.host.name = ctx.agent.name; } else if (ctx.csv_Computer != null) { ctx.host.name = ctx.csv_Computer; } } ctx.fp = ctx.fp != null ? ctx.fp : new HashMap(); ctx.fp.parsing_version = '2.0-full';
